task_completion.description: Navigate to the Add Layer page and select the correct workspace and data store.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'New Layer' page in GeoServer with 'ne:postgis_ne' selected in the 'Add layer from' dropdown.

task_completion.description: Select the 'ne_countries' table to publish as a layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the list of resources for the 'ne:postgis_ne' store, and the agent clicking the 'Publish' link next to the 'ne_countries' layer.

task_completion.description: Set the correct Name and Title for the new layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Edit Layer' page (Data tab) shows the 'Name' field set to 'ne_countries_3857' and the 'Title' field set to 'Natural Earth Countries (Web Mercator)'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Coordinate Reference Systems to reproject to Web Mercator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Coordinate Reference Systems' section shows 'Declared SRS' set to 'EPSG:3857' and 'SRS handling' set to 'Reproject native to declared' (or 'Force declared').

task_completion.description: Compute the Native and Lat/Lon bounding boxes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Bounding Boxes' section shows numeric values populated in the Min X, Min Y, Max X, and Max Y fields for both 'Native Bounding Box' and 'Lat/Lon Bounding Box' (not empty or zeros).

task_completion.description: Save the configuration and verify the layer is published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'Layers' list or 'Layer Preview' page with the newly created 'ne_countries_3857' layer successfully listed.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GeoServer web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the GeoServer UI at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/, rather than just terminal windows executing curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent used GeoServer's virtual reprojection rather than modifying the underlying PostGIS database table.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing psql commands or ogr2ogr commands altering the 'ne_countries' table directly to EPSG:3857.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created a new layer rather than renaming the existing one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The breadcrumbs or page title should indicate 'New Layer' or 'Add Layer' initially, ensuring the original 'ne_countries' layer remains intact.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target layer name must be exactly 'ne_countries_3857'. The native table name is 'ne_countries'. The Declared SRS must be 'EPSG:3857'. The title must be exactly 'Natural Earth Countries (Web Mercator)'. The Projection Policy (SRS handling) must be set to 'Reproject native to declared' (REPROJECT_TO_DECLARED) or 'Force declared' (FORCE_DECLARED).
